title: Wechat Group Chat Screenshot Meme AI
sourceTitle: WeChat Group Chat Screenshot Meme AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Realistic mobile group-chat screenshot meme for startup team shipping a bug fix at midnight, preserving the WeChat-style chat rhythm and rendered through generic mobile group chat interface. Subject: founder, designer, engineer, ops exchange funny, natural Chinese group-chat messages about startup team shipping a bug fix at midnight, including red-packet style prompts, stickers, read-state cues, timestamps, and casual internet humor. Scene: High-fidelity phone screenshot of a Chinese mobile group chat, with believable chat bubbles, avatar rows, time separators, message rhythm, emoji or meme inserts, and complete platform UI details. Composition: Fixed vertical phone-screenshot layout: status bar and chat title area at top, stacked alternating message bubbles, member avatars, time display, red packet notification, sticker or meme bubble, read status cue, and input-area hint at the bottom. Signature Elements: startup team shipping a bug fix at midnight, founder, designer, engineer, ops, generic mobile group chat interface, red packet prompt, stickers, read status, time display, WeChat UI details, realistic Chinese font texture, and funny internet-chat pacing. Style: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Color Palette: Authentic mobile chat palette with clean white or pale grey background, green outgoing bubbles, white incoming bubbles, red packet accent, small emoji colors, and readable dark Chinese text. Lighting: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Typography: Chinese chat text must be short, natural, readable, and typo-free; group labels and timestamps stay small and realistic inside generic mobile group chat interface. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
